sections.paragraph:
Original: בּבל

Transliteration: bâbel

Phonetic: baw-bel'

BDB Definition:

Babel or Babylon = "confusion (by mixing)"
  1. Babel or Babylon, the ancient site and/or capital of Babylonia (modern Hillah) situated on the Euphrates

Origin: from H1101

TWOT entry: 197

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
